title: aster nervosus
intro: Aster nervosus, also known as the Nervous Aster, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Aster nervosus include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving muscle spasms, and promoting relaxation. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
